title: Project Insanity
description: Dungeons, Dinosaurs, Dragons and monsters. What else could you need?
body:
Welcome to our exciting new modpack, designed to foster teamwork and collaboration amongst players! Dive into thrilling dungeons, face off against formidable monsters, dragons, and even dinosaurs, all while exploring stunningly diverse terrain and uncovering rewarding loot.




Our modpack encourages players to band together, leveraging the power of teamwork for greater success. However, it also offers a rewarding solo experience for those who prefer to venture alone. As we continue to develop this modpack, we're focused on several key areas of improvement:



**1.**

Optimized Performance: We're dedicated to ensuring smooth gameplay for all our adventurers, focusing on optimizing performance to enhance the overall gaming experience.


**2.**
Enhanced User Experience: Your enjoyment is paramount to us. We're committed to refining the user interface and overall experience to make navigating the modpack intuitive and engaging.


**3.**
Incorporating Modded Loot: We're working diligently to seamlessly integrate modded loot into dungeon rewards and vanilla structures, enriching the exploration experience and providing exciting new treasures to discover.


**4.**
Balanced Mob Drops: Finding the perfect balance for mob drops is crucial for maintaining a challenging yet rewarding gameplay experience. We're fine-tuning this aspect to ensure every encounter feels meaningful.


**5.**
And much more! This is just the beginning of our journey. As we continue to develop and refine our modpack, we're excited to bring you even more adventures, challenges, and opportunities for collaboration. Join us as we embark on this epic adventure together!





**
Contributions, acknowledgments, and special thanks**



**Some of the mods that were used that contributes to the pack:**

https://modrinth.com/mod/when-dungeons-arise
https://modrinth.com/mod/macaws-bridges
https://modrinth.com/mod/corpse

_special thanks to Mongoose_artist for permission to use his mod in this Modpack!_
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/born-in-chaos
